title: PostgreSQL connection pooling
content_preview: PostgreSQL pool size 20. Connection timeout 30s.

title: PostgreSQL halfvec optimization
content_preview: PostgreSQL halfvec saves 50% storage. Trigger syncs float32 to halfvec.

title: PostgreSQL migration to v18
content_preview: Migrating to PostgreSQL 18 with pgvector 0.8. HNSW index m=16.

title: Redis persistence AOF
content_preview: Redis AOF enabled for persistence. Appendfsync everysec for balance.

title: Redis TTL configuration
content_preview: Redis TTL set to 300s for cache entries. Maxmemory 2GB with allkeys-lru eviction.

title: Redis cache setup
content_preview: We chose Redis 7 as L2 cache. Write-through strategy with 5-min TTL.

R: Ψ [V14] Analyse PEVS : C=1.5 (L1).
Une liste Python est une structure de données mutable, ordonnée et hétérogène.
Implémentation : Tableau dynamique d'objets (C-Array de pointeurs).
Propriétés :
- Indexation (0-based)
- Slicing [start:stop:step...
